arm_grant_air_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1939 = yes

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1942 = yes

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1943 = yes

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # iw_small_airframe - 1926
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_small_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_fighters_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # cv_fighter1 - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { cv_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # scout_plane1 - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = scout_plane1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # engines_2 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { engines_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # range_improvements - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { range_improvements = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # aircraft_construction - 1936

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }

                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { modern_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # aa_cannon_3 - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aa_cannon_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { supersonic_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (11 techs) --

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# hfighter_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# hfighter_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# hfighter_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1944 = yes

    }
}

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # naval_bomber1 - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { naval_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # cv_naval_bomber1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { cv_naval_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # naval_bomber2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { naval_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # cv_naval_bomber2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { cv_naval_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers

        }
    }
}
# -- AIR / STRATEGIC_BOMBERS (10 techs) --

# iw_large_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_large_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_large_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber_a
#   year=1955 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1955 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1926 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # iw_large_airframe - 1926
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_large_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # strategic_bomber1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_large_airframe - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_large_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    }
}
# -- AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (10 techs) --

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# med_maritime1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# med_maritime2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# med_maritime3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber_a
#   year=1955 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1955 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_bomber - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_bomber }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { early_bomber = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tactical_bomber1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { tactical_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # med_maritime1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = med_maritime1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { med_maritime1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) --

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            }
            set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[streamlined_line_b]

# modern_radio
#   year=1953 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_computing_machine_4
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[streamlined_line_c]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1953 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1955 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # electronic_mechanical_engineering - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { electronic_mechanical_engineering = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # radio - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = radio }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { radio = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # mechanical_computing - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { mechanical_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { improved_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                NOT = { has_tech = future_encryption_3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { future_encryption_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # future_decryption_3 - 1951
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = future_decryption_3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { future_decryption_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # future_computing_machine_3 - 1951
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = future_computing_machine_3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
                has_tech = streamlined_line_b
            }
            set_technology = { future_computing_machine_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1953 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # modern_radio - 1953
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_radio }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { modern_radio = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1955 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # future_computing_machine_4 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = future_computing_machine_4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
                has_tech = streamlined_line_c
            }
            set_technology = { future_computing_machine_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1930 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1937 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1954 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # etax_doctrine - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = etax_doctrine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { etax_doctrine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1930 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # steel_production_1 - 1930
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = steel_production_1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { steel_production_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1934 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # butadiene_processing - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = butadiene_processing }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { butadiene_processing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # butadiene_processing - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = butadiene_processing }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # excavation3 - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { flexible_line_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # streamlined_line_a - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = streamlined_line_a }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { streamlined_line_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # concentrated_industry_a - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry_a }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # dispersed_industry_a - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry_a }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = construction_c }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (7 techs) --

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# etax_the_bomb
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # atomic_research - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { atomic_research = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # isotope_separation_centrifugal - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }

        # nuclear_reactor - 1943
