                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_reactor = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_reactor_heavy_water = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # etax_the_bomb - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = etax_the_bomb }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { etax_the_bomb = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # nukes - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = nukes }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nukes = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # thermonuclear_bombs - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = thermonuclear_bombs }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { thermonuclear_bombs = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (16 techs) --

# rdf0
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_identification_friend_or_foe
#   year=1937 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf1
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf2
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf3
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf4
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf5
#   year=1949 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_2
#   year=1949 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf6
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_3
#   year=1953 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1937 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1953 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # rdf0 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rdf0 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { rdf0 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # radio_detection - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = radio_detection }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { radio_detection = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # rdf5 - 1949

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rdf5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { rdf5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # future_radar_2 - 1949
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = future_radar_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { future_radar_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { future_radar_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ROCKETS (19 techs) --

# rocket_artillery
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery2
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery3
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# experimental_rockets
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery4
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_guidance
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_a
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# jet_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_b
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# improved_rocket_engines
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# advanced_rocket_engines
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_c
#   year=1948 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_d
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_e
#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1954 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # rocket_artillery - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { rocket_artillery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { sp_rockets_rocket_bomber = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }

            limit = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { jet_engines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1948 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets

                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

# -- LAND / ANTI_AIR (10 techs) --

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_a
#   year=1944 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_b
#   year=1945 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_c
#   year=1948 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_d
#   year=1951 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_e
#   year=1954 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1954 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # interwar_antiair - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            }
            set_technology = { interwar_antiair = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / ANTI_TANK (15 techs) --

# photo_reconnaisance
#   year=1922 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# mountain_tanks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_a
#   year=1944 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_centrifugal_jet_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_b
#   year=1945 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_c
#   year=1948 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_d
#   year=1951 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_e
#   year=1954 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1954 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # photo_reconnaisance - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = photo_reconnaisance }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { photo_reconnaisance = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / ARTILLERY (20 techs) --

# r56_gw_railway_gun
#   year=1917 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# r56_railway_mortar_subtech
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gw_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# railway_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_shock_hardening_techniques
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_a
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_b
#   year=1945 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_c
#   year=1948 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_d
#   year=1951 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_e
#   year=1954 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1917 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1930 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1954 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery_y1917 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # r56_gw_railway_gun - 1917
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = r56_gw_railway_gun }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { r56_gw_railway_gun = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

}

# -- LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (16 techs) --

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# r56_heavy_tank_studies_tech
#   year=1937 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_a
#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_b
#   year=1951 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1937 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1951 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_heavy_tank - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_tank_chassis - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# support_weapons_c

#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# winter_clothes_1944

#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# camo1955
#   year=1954 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

arm_grant_land_infantry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1952 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1952 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1953 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1954 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # support_weapons - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # r56_anti_tank_kit - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = r56_anti_tank_kit }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { r56_anti_tank_kit = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # paratroopers - 1936

                NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { paratroopers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # marines - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = marines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { marines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_mountaineers - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_mountaineers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        # rangers_tech - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { rangers_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # jungletroops - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = jungletroops }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { jungletroops = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # shocktroops - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = shocktroops }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { shocktroops = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        # winter_clothes_gw - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = winter_clothes_gw }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { winter_clothes_gw = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        # jaegers - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = jaegers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

                NOT = { has_tech = jngdst_clothes_gw }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        # NOR_concealed_skirmishers - 1936

                NOT = { has_tech = NOR_concealed_skirmishers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                NOT = { has_tech = AUS_alpine_warfare }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }

        # etax_the_means - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = etax_the_means }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons2 - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_special_forces - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_special_forces }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_special_forces = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons2 - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # etax_glory - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = etax_glory }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { etax_glory = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # improved_infantry_weapons - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_infantry_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { improved_infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_at - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_at }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_at = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers2 }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_mountaineers2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # rangers_tech2 - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { rangers_tech2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # jungletroops2 - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = jungletroops2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { jungletroops2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # shocktroops2 - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = shocktroops2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { shocktroops2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # jaegers2 - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = jaegers2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { jaegers2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # desertinfantry_at2 - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = desertinfantry_at2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { desertinfantry_at2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # r56_anti_tank_rifle_grenade_tech - 1939

                NOT = { has_tech = r56_anti_tank_rifle_grenade_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { r56_anti_tank_rifle_grenade_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_at_a }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_at_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1949 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # rangers_b - 1949

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rangers_b }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
