                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { jaegers5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # desertinfantry_at5 - 1949

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = desertinfantry_at5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { desertinfantry_at5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (21 techs) --

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1930 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car1
#   year=1930 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1939 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car3
#   year=1942 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# modern_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1944 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_a
#   year=1945 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1945 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_b
#   year=1949 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry_a
#   year=1949 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# oscillating_turret_tech
#   year=1950 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1930 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # gwtank - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1930 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # gwtank_chassis - 1930
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # armored_car1 - 1930
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = oscillating_turret_tech }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { oscillating_turret_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (11 techs) --

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1938 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_a
#   year=1947 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_b
#   year=1949 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1950 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_d
#   year=1953 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_e
#   year=1955 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1953 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1955 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # basic_medium_tank_chassis - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) --

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # main_battle_tank - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # main_battle_tank_chassis - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / MOTORISED (3 techs) --

# tech_trucks
#   year=1920 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorized_rocket_unit
#   year=1939 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[rocket_artillery]

arm_grant_land_motorised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1920 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1939 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_motorised_y1920 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_trucks - 1920
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            }
            set_technology = { tech_trucks = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_motorised_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # motorized_rocket_unit - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
                has_tech = rocket_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1920 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1930 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1954 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_support - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_support = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1920 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_train - 1920
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_train }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { basic_train = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1930 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # sniper_rifle - 1930
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sniper_rifle }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { sniper_rifle = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # flamethrower - 1930
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = flamethrower }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { flamethrower = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_tech = motorised_infantry

            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_logistics_company - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
                has_tech = motorised_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_signal_company - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
                has_tech = radio
                has_tech = motorised_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_signal_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # sp_armored_engineer_tech - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_engineer_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_engineer_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # sp_armored_maintenance_tech - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_maintenance_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_maintenance_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # sp_armored_signal_tech - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_signal_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_signal_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

        # night_vision2 - 1947
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = night_vision2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { night_vision2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # r56_convoy_highways_3 - 1947
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = r56_convoy_highways_3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { r56_convoy_highways_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1953 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1955 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_light_td - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_light_art - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_light_spaa - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_td - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_art - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_spaa - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_light_td - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { improved_light_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_light_art - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { improved_light_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_light_spaa - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { improved_light_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # JAP_lighter_tanks - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = JAP_lighter_tanks }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { JAP_lighter_tanks = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # GER_heavy_armored_car - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = GER_heavy_armored_car }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { GER_heavy_armored_car = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # armor_tech_1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { armor_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # engine_tech_1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { engine_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # NOR_rikstanken_tech - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = NOR_rikstanken_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { NOR_rikstanken_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # amphibious_tank_chassis - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # armor_tech_2 - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { armor_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # engine_tech_2 - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { engine_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { armor_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # engine_tech_4 - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { engine_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
